title: Cache Truthfulness Dataset
summary: Benchmark slice for fixing stale or misleading local memory signals without weakening scan provenance, ignore rules, or script-safe output.

documents.title: Technical Architecture
documents.reason: Workspace readiness and cache truthfulness are part of the core architecture.

documents.title: CLI and MCP Specification
documents.reason: Human and JSON outputs must stay deterministic and script-safe.

reuse_targets.title: Workspace state and readiness
reuse_targets.reason: Cache status and provenance should be fixed where workspace memory is built.

reuse_targets.title: Workspace cache tests
reuse_targets.reason: Bug fixes should pin repeated scan and cache invalidation behavior.

policy_targets: Do not hide stale cache state behind a ready status.
Do not print decorative output in JSON mode.
Respect configured ignore paths during cache rebuilds.
